title: Senior Frontend Developer at Urban Company Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Urban Company Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Company Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Urban Company Digital Technologies:
Urban Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company Digital Technologies!
